Localization.Description: The NTLM hash of a host machine account is intercepted as a result of authentication coercion

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} intercepted the NTLM hash of the machine account of host {event_src.host} as a result of authentication coercion. Techniques used: {reason}. Possible attack tool: {datafield8}.
